title: Add parameter verification for api creation network
body:
Signed-off-by: zhangguanzhang <zhangguanzhang@qq.com>
In the absence of parameter verification, an incorrect network will be created https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/7262#issuecomment-670967217

comments.body:
I test this is ok on my local machine.......
```
[root@sz-test apiv2]# ./test-apiv2 35
ok 1 [35-networks] GET networks/non-existing-network : status=404
ok 2 [35-networks] POST libpod/networks/create [] : status=201
ok 3 [35-networks] POST libpod/networks/create [] : .Filename ('/etc/cni/net.d/cni-podman1.conflist') ~ .*\.conflist
ok 4 [35-networks] POST libpod/networks/create ["Subnet":{"IP":"10.10.254.0","Mask":[255,255,255,0]}] : status=201
ok 5 [35-networks] POST libpod/networks/create ["Subnet":{"IP":"10.10.254.0","Mask":[255,255,255,0]}] : .Filename ('/etc/cni/net.d/cni-podman2.conflist') ~ .*\.conflist
ok 6 [35-networks] POST libpod/networks/create ["Subnet":{"IP":"10.10.1.0","Mask":[]}] : status=500
ok 7 [35-networks] POST libpod/networks/create ["Subnet":{"IP":"10.10.1.0","Mask":[]}] : .cause ('network <nil>'s ip or mask cannot be empty') ~ .*cannot be empty
ok 8 [35-networks] POST libpod/networks/create ["Subnet":{"IP":"10.10.1.0","Mask":[0,255,255,0]}] : status=500
ok 9 [35-networks] POST libpod/networks/create ["Subnet":{"IP":"10.10.1.0","Mask":[0,255,255,0]}] : .cause ('network 10.10.1.0/00ffff00's mask is invalid') ~ .*mask is invalid
1..9
[root@sz-test apiv2]# 
```
@edsantiago PTAL

A couple of the failing test runs are rootless... which can't use CNI networks. You might need to figure out how to isolate the network creation tests to rootfull runs. 

I also saw something in IRC earlier today about having to rebase on master to fix some CI runs, in case that's useful
